title: 综合应用场景图
prompt: Create {argument name="quantity" default="24"} LINE stickers of {argument name="animals" default="animals"} in a quirky hand-drawn style. Target {argument name="target audience" default="Japanese Gen Z"} with a trendy style that can aim for top downloads.
